landing.hero_subtitle: Create a digital queue for your business in under 60 seconds. No hardware needed.
landing.step1_desc: Set up your queue with custom services, counters, and branding in minutes.
landing.step2_desc: Print or display the QR code. Customers scan to join — no app download needed.
landing.step3_desc: Staff calls the next customer with one tap. Real-time updates for everyone.
landing.feat_realtime_desc: Customers see their position update live. No more asking 'how much longer?'
landing.feat_multi_service_desc: Run different service streams from one queue. Route customers to the right counter.
landing.feat_display_desc: Show now-serving numbers on a big screen. Works on any TV or monitor.
landing.feat_analytics_desc: Track wait times, peak hours, and staff performance with built-in reports.
landing.feat_notifications_desc: Customers get notified when their turn is near. They can wait anywhere.
landing.feat_noapp_desc: Works in any mobile browser. Zero friction for your customers.
landing.ready_subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using QueueDrop to serve customers better.
landing.how_it_works_subtitle: Get up and running in three simple steps
landing.features_subtitle: Powerful features to streamline your queue operations

customer.your_info_desc: Please fill in your information before taking a number.
customer.keep_page_open: Keep this page open to get notified when it is your turn
customer.your_turn: Your turn! Please go to the counter.
customer.captcha_desc: Answer the math question to continue.
customer.staff_will_assign: Staff will assign you to the appropriate service.

about.title: About QueueDrop
about.description: QueueDrop is a modern, cloud-based queue management platform that helps businesses eliminate physical waiting lines. We believe no one should have to stand in line when technology can make the experience better for everyone.
about.mission_text: To make waiting fair, transparent, and stress-free for customers and staff alike.
about.what_is_text: QueueApp is a modern, digital queue management platform designed for businesses of all sizes. It replaces traditional paper ticket systems with a seamless, mobile-first experience that customers and staff love. No hardware to buy, no apps to install -- just scan a QR code and join the queue.
about.benefit_1: Set up in under 60 seconds with zero hardware
about.benefit_2: Customers join via QR code -- no app download needed
about.benefit_4: Multiple services and counters per queue
about.benefit_6: Analytics and insights to optimize operations
about.contact_text: Have questions, feedback, or partnership inquiries? We would love to hear from you.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1_text: By accessing and using QueueDrop, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service.
terms.section2_text: QueueDrop provides digital queue management services. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time.
terms.section3_text: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for all activities that occur under your account.
terms.section4_text: We collect and process data as described in our Privacy Policy. By using the service, you consent to such processing.
terms.section5_text: QueueDrop is provided 'as is'. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of our service.
terms.section6_text: All content, trademarks, and intellectual property associated with QueueApp are owned by QueueApp and its licensors. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the service without prior written consent.
terms.section7_text: We may suspend or terminate your access to the service at any time for violation of these terms or for any reason at our sole discretion. You may also delete your account at any time through the account settings.
terms.section8_text: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_text: We collect information you provide directly, such as account details and queue data. We also collect usage data automatically.
privacy.section2_text: We use collected information to provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and ensure security.
privacy.section3_text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with service providers who assist in our operations.
privacy.section4_text: We retain your data as long as your account is active. You may request deletion at any time.
privacy.section5_text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.section6_text: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption in transit and at rest, secure authentication, and regular security reviews.
privacy.section7_text: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We may also use analytics cookies to understand how the service is used.
privacy.section8_text: If you have questions or concerns about this privacy policy or your data, please contact us at

session_setup.greeting: Hello, {name}. Please select your shift information.

guide.step1_desc: Use your phone camera to scan the QR code posted at the counter or entrance.
guide.step2_desc: Choose the service you need. The system will show the number of people waiting and estimated time.
guide.step3_desc: After confirming, you will receive a queue number and verification code. Keep this screen for staff verification.
guide.step4_desc: Enable notifications to get alerted when your turn is near. You do not need to wait at the counter.
guide.tip1: Each device can only take 1 number per queue.
guide.tip2: Your number is valid for today only.
guide.tip3: If your estimated time has passed without being called, please contact the staff.

auth_page.staff_subtitle: Sign in to start serving customers
